subject: fix(charts): reorder palette so semantic colors appear late in sequence
body:
Red, green, and yellow early in the series palette could imply
success/error/warning status on chart items that are just data
categories. Moved those hues to positions 13+ so the first 12 slots
use neutral tones (blue, purple, teal, pink, orange, cyan).

Tags: ui, charts, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
